info.title: Scrapio
info.description: Turn any URL into structured data. Fetch raw HTML, crawl sites, extract structured content, interact with dynamic pages, and search the web through one API.

post.description: Fetches a URL and returns its content as HTML, Markdown, JSON, or a screenshot. Set `render_js: true` to execute JavaScript before capturing the output. Requests that exceed 15 seconds are automatically promoted to async jobs and return a `job_id` to poll.

js_render.summary: Render JavaScript and extract structured data

202.description: Request exceeded inline timeout; async job queued.

422.description: Extraction validation failed on the fetched content.

502.description: Target site blocked or rejected the request.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/fetch \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url":"https://example.com","output":["markdown"]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/fetch",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"url": "https://example.com", "output": ["markdown"]},
)
print(resp.json()["outputs"]["markdown"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Execute a Google search and receive structured SERP results including organic results, ads, images, news, shopping, and maps. Supports classic, news, images, maps, shopping, and AI-mode search types with locale and device targeting.

200.description: Structured Google SERP response with organic results, ads, and enrichments.

429.description: Google rate-limited or CAPTCHA-challenged the request.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/google/search?search=openai&search_type=classic&country_code=us" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/google/search",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"search": "openai", "country_code": "us"},
)
print(resp.json()["organic_results"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.summary: Crawl a site from seed URLs
post.description: Breadth-first crawls one or more seed URLs, following same-origin links up to `max_pages` and `max_depth`. Each page is fetched inline and returned with its own status; the overall response is `partial` if any page failed. For large crawls, submit via `POST /v1/jobs` with `kind: "crawl"` instead.

basic.summary: Crawl up to 5 pages as Markdown

200.description: Crawl completed; per-page results and a summary are returned.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/crawl \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"seeds":["https://example.com"],"max_pages":5,"output":["markdown"]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/crawl",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"seeds": ["https://example.com"], "max_pages": 5, "output": ["markdown"]},
)
for page in resp.json()["result"]["pages"]:
    print(page["url"], page["status"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.description: Breadth-first discovers URLs reachable from one or more seed URLs without extracting page content, up to `max_urls` and `max_depth`. Useful for scoping a crawl before fetching content. For large sites, submit via `POST /v1/jobs` with `kind: "map"` instead.

200.description: URL discovery completed; discovered URLs and a summary are returned.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/map \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"seeds":["https://example.com"],"max_urls":20}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/map",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"seeds": ["https://example.com"], "max_urls": 20},
)
for entry in resp.json()["result"]["urls"]:
    print(entry["url"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.summary: Interact with a page in a real browser
post.description: Drives a real browser through a sequence of actions (`goto`, `click`, `type`, `select`, `press`, `scroll`, `wait_for`, `wait_ms`) against a URL and returns the resulting page content. Pass `session: { id }` to reuse cookies and storage state across multiple calls. Set `output` to include `screenshot` to capture a rendered image.

click_and_capture.summary: Click a link and capture Markdown

200.description: Interaction completed; final page outputs and step results are returned.

400.description: Invalid request parameters, or no actions provided.

409.description: The referenced session was updated concurrently.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/interact \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url":"https://example.com","actions":[{"type":"click","selector":"a"}],"output":["markdown"]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/interact",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={
        "url": "https://example.com",
        "actions": [{"type": "click", "selector": "a"}],
        "output": ["markdown"],
    },
)
print(resp.json()["result"]["outputs"]["markdown"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.summary: Search the web and optionally fetch results
post.description: Runs a Google search and, when `fetch_results: true`, fetches each result page and returns its content in the requested `output` formats (optionally with structured `extract`). Without `fetch_results`, only the ranked search results are returned. For large workflows, submit via `POST /v1/jobs` with `kind: "search"` instead.

search_and_fetch.summary: Search and fetch result pages as Markdown

200.description: Search (and optional fetch) completed; ranked results are returned.

400.description: Invalid search parameters, or output/extract requested without fetch_results.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/search \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"best TypeScript frameworks","max_results":5,"fetch_results":true,"output":["markdown"]}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/search",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"query": "best TypeScript frameworks", "max_results": 5, "fetch_results": True, "output": ["markdown"]},
)
for r in resp.json()["result"]["results"]:
    print(r["title"], r["url"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Returns the current status and metadata for an async job. Poll this endpoint until `result_available` is `true` or the status is `failed` or `cancelled`, then call `GET /v1/jobs/{id}/result` to retrieve the output.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The job identifier returned when the job was created.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs/job_abc123 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
Node.js

post.description: Submit any surface operation (fetch, crawl, interact, search, map) as an async job. Returns a `job_id` immediately; poll `GET /v1/jobs/{id}` for status and retrieve the output from `GET /v1/jobs/{id}/result` once complete. Send an `Idempotency-Key` header to safely retry submission. Results are retained for 24 hours.

202.description: Job accepted and queued for execution.

409.description: Idempotency key reused with a different request body.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: my-job-001" \
  -d '{"kind":"fetch","input":{"url":"https://example.com","output":["markdown"]}}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}", "Idempotency-Key": "my-job-001"},
    json={"kind": "fetch", "input": {"url": "https://example.com", "output": ["markdown"]}},
)
print(resp.json()["job_id"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Retrieves the completed output of an async job. Returns `409` if the job has not finished yet — check `GET /v1/jobs/{id}` first and only call this endpoint when `result_available` is `true`. Results expire 24 hours after job completion.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The job identifier returned when the job was created.

404.description: Job not found or result expired.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs/job_abc123/result \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
result = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs/job_abc123/result",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
).json()
print(result["outputs"]["markdown"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.description: Requests cancellation of an async job. Returns `202` if the job was still queued or running and cancellation was accepted, or `200` if the job had already reached a terminal state (its final status is returned unchanged).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The job identifier returned when the job was created.

200.description: Job had already reached a terminal state; its final status is returned.

202.description: Cancellation accepted for a queued or running job.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs/job_abc123/cancel \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/jobs/job_abc123/cancel",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
)
print(resp.json()["status"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.summary: Queue a YouTube search crawl job
post.description: Submits a large-scale YouTube search as an async job. Useful when `limit` exceeds what the synchronous search endpoint can return in a single call. Returns a `job_id` to poll for results.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/search/crawl \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"search":"machine learning tutorials","limit":500,"type":"video"}'

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.post(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/search/crawl",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    json={"search": "machine learning tutorials", "limit": 500, "type": "video"},
)
print(resp.json()["job_id"])

get.description: Search YouTube and return structured results including title, URL, channel, description, view count, and duration. Supports filtering by type (video, channel, playlist), language, country, and geo-location. For large result sets, use the `/v1/youtube/search/crawl` async endpoint.

200.description: Paginated YouTube search results with metadata.

404.description: No results found for the query.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/search?search=openai&type=video&limit=10" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/search",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"search": "openai", "type": "video", "limit": 10},
)
for r in resp.json()["results"]:
    print(r["title"], r["url"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Retrieve full metadata for a YouTube video by its ID: title, channel, description, publish date, view/like counts, tags, category, and available caption tracks. Set `include_subtitles: true` to include subtitle data in the same response.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/videos/dQw4w9WgXcQ?include_subtitles=false" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/videos/dQw4w9WgXcQ",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"include_subtitles": False},
)
print(resp.json()["video"]["title"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Download subtitle/caption tracks for a YouTube video. Returns timestamped transcript segments grouped by origin (auto-generated vs creator-uploaded) and language. Set `include_timestamps: false` to receive plain text only.

200.description: Subtitle tracks grouped by origin and language.

400.description: Invalid video ID or language parameter.

404.description: No subtitle tracks available for this video.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/subtitles?video_id=dQw4w9WgXcQ&language=en" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/youtube/subtitles",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"video_id": "dQw4w9WgXcQ", "language": "en"},
)
print(resp.json()["subtitles"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.summary: Queue an Amazon search crawl job
get.description: Submits a large Amazon search crawl as an async job, returning a `job_id` to poll. Use this for multi-page searches or when you need more results than the synchronous search endpoint returns.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/search/crawl?query=wireless+headphones&max_pages=5" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/search/crawl",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"query": "wireless headphones", "max_pages": 5},
)
print(resp.json()["job_id"])

get.description: Retrieve structured product data from an Amazon product page: title, price, rating, review count, images, bullet points, description, and seller info. Accepts an ASIN or a full Amazon product URL.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/product?asin=B08N5WRWNW&country=us" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/product",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"asin": "B08N5WRWNW", "country": "us"},
)
print(resp.json()["title"], resp.json()["price"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Retrieve current offer pricing for an Amazon product, including new, used, and third-party seller listings. Returns price breakdown, condition, and seller metadata.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/pricing?asin=B08N5WRWNW&country=us" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/pricing",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"asin": "B08N5WRWNW", "country": "us"},
)
print(resp.json())

get.description: Search Amazon and return structured results for the first page: product titles, ASINs, prices, ratings, and image URLs. For multi-page searches, use the `/v1/amazon/search/crawl` async endpoint.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/search?query=wireless+headphones&country=us" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/amazon/search",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"query": "wireless headphones", "country": "us"},
)
for r in resp.json()["results"]:
    print(r["title"], r["price"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.summary: Queue a Walmart search crawl job
get.description: Submits a large Walmart search crawl as an async job, returning a `job_id` to poll. Use this for multi-page searches beyond what the synchronous search endpoint returns.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/search/crawl?query=coffee+maker&max_pages=3" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/search/crawl",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"query": "coffee maker", "max_pages": 3},
)
print(resp.json()["job_id"])

get.description: Search Walmart and return structured results for the first page: product names, item IDs, prices, ratings, and image URLs. For multi-page searches, use the `/v1/walmart/search/crawl` async endpoint.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/search?query=coffee+maker" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/search",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"query": "coffee maker"},
)
for r in resp.json()["results"]:
    print(r["name"], r["price"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Retrieve structured product data from a Walmart product page: name, price, rating, review count, images, description, and seller info. Accepts a Walmart item ID or a full product URL.

400.description: Invalid item ID or request parameters.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/product?item_id=44782430" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SCRAPIO_API_KEY"

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, requests
resp = requests.get(
    "https://api.scrapio.dev/v1/walmart/product",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['SCRAPIO_API_KEY']}"},
    params={"item_id": "44782430"},
)
print(resp.json()["name"], resp.json()["price"])

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
